Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Continued To Dec-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar May-02-2022 Continued To Jul-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gwen Wu, via Zoom, for Ethel Marie Bealey-Pellette, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports that she is waiting for the Inventory and Appraisal (I&A) from the probate referee and that the Tax Board had been notified of this matter four months ago and they have not filed a claim. Counsel advises that a Petition for Final Distribution is likely to be filed once the I&A is filed and that there are waivers from the Beneficiaries. Counsel advises that a Notice of Change of Handling Attorney is pending in the e-filing queue.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jul-11-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not reported.
